title: poa tolmatchewii var. stricta
intro: Poa tolmatchewii var. stricta, also known as the Tolmatchew's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa tolmatchewii var. stricta include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
